zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer於1252年10月27日出生在英國賀福爾維格莫時，他的父親Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore22歲，母親Maud de Braose28歲。他於1285年9月與Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes在英國賀福爾維格莫結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1304年登記服兵役。他於1265年被列為treasurer of york 。他去世於1304年7月17日在英國賀福爾維格莫 卡素享年51歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer于1252年10月27日出生在英国賀福爾維格莫时，他的父亲Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore22岁，母亲Maud de Braose28岁。他于1285年9月与Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes在英国賀福爾維格莫结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1304年登记服兵役。他于1265年被列为treasurer of york 。他去世于1304年7月17日在英国賀福爾維格莫 卡素享年51岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer was born on 27 October 1252, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, was 22 and his mother, Maud de Braose, was 28. He married Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes in September 1285, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1304. In 1265, at the age of 13, his occupation is listed as treasurer of york . He died on 17 July 1304, in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.Builth, Breconshire, Wales: Builth, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer est né le 27 octobre 1252, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Maud de Braose, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes en septembre 1285, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1304. En 1265, à l’âge de 13 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est treasurer of york . Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1304, à Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer am 27. Oktober 1252 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore 22 und seine Mutter Maud de Braose 28. Er hat im September 1285 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1304 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1265, als er 13 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als treasurer of york  aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Juli 1304 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer è nato il il 27 ottobre 1252 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Braose, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes nel settembre 1285, nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1304. Nel 1265, all'età di 13 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come treasurer of york . Morì il 17 luglio 1304, nel Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimerが1252年10月27日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmoreは22歳，母Maud de Braoseは28歳であった。1285年9月にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーでMargaret Eleanor de Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1304年に兵役登録をした。1265年，13歳の時，職業はtreasurer of york と記録されている。彼は1304年7月17日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモー カストルで51歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーウィグモー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer(이)가 1252년 10월 27일 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Braose(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1285년 9월 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1265년, 13세의 나이로 그의 직업은 treasurer of york 이었다. 그는 1304년 7월 17일 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 카스틀에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 위그모어 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.27 October 1252–17 July 1304: 27 de outubro de 1252–17 de julho de 1304
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer nasceu em 27 de outubro de 1252, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Braose, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes em setembro de 1285, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1304. Em 1265, com 13 anos, sua profissão aparece como treasurer of york . Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1304, em Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Builth, Breconshire, Wales: Builth, Breconshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer родился 27 октября 1252 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Braose, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes сентябрь 1285 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1304 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1265 году, в возрасте 13 лет, работал по профессии treasurer of york . Он умер 17 июля 1304 г. в местности вигмор кастл, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности вигмор эбби, вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.27 October 1252–17 July 1304: 27 de octubre de 1252–17 de julio de 1304
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer nació el 27 de octubre de 1252, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Maud de Braose, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes en septiembre de 1285, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1304. En 1265, a la edad de 13 años, su ocupación registrada era treasurer of york . Murió el 17 de julio de 1304, en Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
